programName: Childcare Facility Lead Service Line Replacement Program
subsidyType: free city-managed replacement program for licensed childcare facilities with lead service lines
publicSideCovered: yes city-owned lead service lines are replaced through the program
privateSideCovered: yes customer-owned lead portions are also replaced if identified
propertyRules: licensed childcare facilities are invited to sign up and applications are first come first served while funding remains
contractorRules: city schedules the work and handles contractor coordination
